name: WhatDoTheyKnow MCP
description: Search UK FOI requests, authorities, and responses on WhatDoTheyKnow. Draft FOI requests.

tools.name: search_request_events
tools.description: Full-text search of FOI requests and responses

tools.name: search_authorities
tools.description: Search UK public authorities by name

tools.name: get_request_feed_items
tools.description: Fetch event timeline for a specific FOI request

tools.name: get_request_detail
tools.description: Fetch full public JSON for a specific FOI request

tools.name: get_user_requests
tools.description: List visible FOI requests for a user

tools.name: get_user_feed_items
tools.description: Fetch parsed activity feed entries for a user

tools.name: get_authority_detail
tools.description: Fetch full public JSON for a public authority

tools.name: build_request_url
tools.description: Build a prefilled WhatDoTheyKnow request URL

tools.name: create_request_record
tools.description: Create a request via the write API (requires WDTK_API_KEY)

tools.name: update_request_state
tools.description: Update user-assessed state of a request (requires WDTK_API_KEY)
